title: sphaerocionium applanata
intro: Sphaerocionium applanata, also known as the flat rock cap, is a species of lichenized fungus belonging to the family Ramalinaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium applanata are said to include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially treating fungal infections. Herbal preparations of Sphaerocionium applanata include teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
